message:
feat: open-claude-code v2 — based on ruDevolution decompilation

Architecture mirrors actual Claude Code v2.1.91 internals:
- Async generator agent loop (13 event types, recursive after tool use)
- 6 built-in tools (Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep) with validateInput/call
- Tool registry with dynamic registration
- 6 permission modes (bypassPermissions, acceptEdits, auto, default, dontAsk, plan)
- Settings chain (user/project/local)
- Anthropic Messages API integration

Based on ruDevolution decompilation:
  https://github.com/ruvnet/rudevolution

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+{
+  "name": "open-claude-code",
+  "version": "2.0.0-alpha.1",
+  "description": "Open source Claude Code CLI — based on ruDevolution decompilation of v2.1.91",
+  "type": "module",
+  "bin": { "occ": "src/index.mjs" },
+  "scripts": {
+    "start": "node src/index.mjs",
+    "test": "node test/test.mjs"
+  },
+  "keywords": ["claude", "code", "cli", "ai", "decompiler"],
+  "license": "MIT",
+  "repository": "https://github.com/ruvnet/open-claude-code"
+}
